calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-20-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Lien Lac, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Paul P. Choi, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Bill Low or Lynne Lowe.
Default was entered against defendant Bill Lowe on November 8, 2010.
Defendant Lynn Lowe's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on November 2, 2010.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 17, 2010, which set the trial date for November 29, 2010. In accordance with the agreement of the parties, this matter was continued to December 13, 2010. Pursuant to the agreement of the parties, this matter was continued to today, December 20, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Hitomi Inque, and against defendant Paul M. Trumble, an individual, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $0.00.
Holdover Damages - $1,755.27.
Costs - $448.00.

Total - $2,203.27.

Additionally, plaintiff Paul P. Choi is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1395 48th Avenue, Apartment 3, San Francisco, CA. The rental agreement is canceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-20-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

Appearances:
Plaintiff Paul Choi, is present.
Attorney, Lien Lac, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Bill Lowe and Lynn Lowe, are present.
Attorney, Heidi Machen , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of NOV-29-2010 remains on calendar.
